glosses.vi: thể dục; bài tập thể dục

sentences.target: Morgens mache ich Gymnastik im Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Morgens mache ich Gymnastik im Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: In the morning I do some exercise in the living room.
translations.es: Por la mañana hago ejercicio en la sala.
translations.fr: Le matin, je fais de l'exercice dans le salon.
translations.it: La mattina faccio un po' di esercizio in salotto.
translations.ru: По утрам делаю зарядку в гостиной.
translations.pt: De manhã faço exercício na sala.
translations.he: בבוקר אני עושה קצת פעילות גופנית בסלון.
translations.vi: Buổi sáng tôi tập thể dục trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: في الصباح أمارس بعض التمارين في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: 's Ochtends doe ik oefeningen in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Вранці я роблю вправи у вітальні.
translations.hi: सुबह मैं लिविंग रूम में कसरत करता हूँ।
translations.el: Το πρωί κάνω γυμναστική στο σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Om morgenen trener jeg i stua.
translations.id: Pagi hari saya berolahraga di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: På morgonen tränar jag i vardagsrummet.
translations.da: Om morgenen træner jeg i stuen.
translations.ja: 朝はリビングで運動します。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb indicating habitual time; sentence-initial frame setter.
Finite verb (present, 1st person singular); verb-second after the initial adverb; takes direct object 'Gymnastik'.
Personal pronoun, nominative 1st singular; subject of 'mache'.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) denoting the activity performed.
Contracted preposition ('in' + 'dem'); governs dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Noun; object of 'im' in dative singular; specifies location.

sentences.target: Sie macht nach der Arbeit leichte Gymnastik.
sentences.reading: /ziː maxt naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t ˈlaɪ̯çtə ɡʏmnaˈstɪk/

translations.de: Sie macht nach der Arbeit leichte Gymnastik.
translations.ipa: /ziː maxt naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t ˈlaɪ̯çtə ɡʏmnaˈstɪk/
translations.en: She does light exercise after work.
translations.es: Después del trabajo hace un poco de ejercicio.
translations.fr: Après le travail, elle fait un peu d'exercice.
translations.it: Dopo il lavoro fa un po' di esercizio.
translations.zh-Hans: 她下班后做点简单的运动。
translations.yue: 佢放工之後做啲輕鬆嘅運動。
translations.ru: После работы она делает лёгкую зарядку.
translations.pt: Depois do trabalho ela faz um pouco de exercício.
translations.he: אחרי העבודה היא עושה קצת פעילות גופנית.
translations.vi: Sau giờ làm cô ấy tập thể dục nhẹ.
translations.nl: Na het werk doet ze wat lichte oefeningen.
translations.uk: Після роботи вона робить легкі вправи.
translations.hi: काम के बाद वह हल्का व्यायाम करती है.
translations.el: Μετά τη δουλειά κάνει λίγη γυμναστική.
translations.nb: Etter jobb gjør hun noen lette øvelser.
translations.sv: Efter jobbet gör hon lite lätt träning.
translations.da: Efter arbejde laver hun let motion.
translations.fi: Töiden jälkeen hän tekee kevyttä liikuntaa.
translations.ja: 仕事の後に軽く運動します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative 3rd singular feminine; subject of 'macht'.
Finite verb (present, 3rd person singular); clause head (verb-second); takes object 'Gymnastik'.
Preposition requiring dative; introduces a temporal complement.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Arbeit'.
Noun; object of 'nach' in dative; temporal complement.
Attributive adjective (strong inflection), agreeing with 'Gymnastik' (accusative feminine singular).
Common noun; direct object (accusative); modified by 'leichte'.

translations.en: Exercise helps me with back pain.
translations.es: El ejercicio me ayuda con el dolor de espalda.
translations.fr: L'exercice m'aide contre le mal de dos.
translations.it: L'esercizio mi aiuta contro il mal di schiena.
translations.zh-Hans: 运动有助于缓解我的背痛。
translations.yue: 運動有助紓緩我嘅腰痛。
translations.ru: Упражнения помогают мне при болях в спине.
translations.pt: O exercício me ajuda com a dor nas costas.
translations.he: פעילות גופנית עוזרת לי בכאבי גב.
translations.vi: Tập thể dục giúp tôi giảm đau lưng.
translations.ar: التمارين تساعدني في تخفيف آلام الظهر.
translations.uk: Вправи допомагають мені при болях у спині.
translations.hi: पीठ के दर्द में व्यायाम से मुझे राहत मिलती है।
translations.pl: Ćwiczenia pomagają mi na ból pleców.
translations.el: Η γυμναστική με βοηθά στον πόνο στη μέση.
translations.id: Olahraga membantu mengurangi nyeri punggung saya.
translations.ro: Exercițiile mă ajută cu durerile de spate.
translations.cs: Cvičení mi pomáhá na bolest zad.
translations.ja: 運動は腰痛に効きます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition taking dative; introduces a conditional/locational prepositional phrase.
Plural noun; object of 'Bei' in dative plural.
Finite verb (present, 3rd person singular); verb-second after fronted PP; 'helfen' selects a dative recipient.
Personal pronoun, dative 1st singular; recipient/indirect object of 'hilft'.
Common noun; nominative subject placed postverbally; the activity is what helps.

sentences.target: Im Park machen wir draußen Gymnastik.

translations.de: Im Park machen wir draußen Gymnastik.
translations.en: We do exercise outside in the park.
translations.es: Hacemos ejercicio al aire libre en el parque.
translations.fr: On fait de l'exercice dehors au parc.
translations.ru: Мы тренируемся в парке на свежем воздухе.
translations.pt: Fazemos exercício ao ar livre no parque.
translations.he: אנחנו עושים פעילות גופנית בחוץ בפארק.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tập thể dục ngoài trời ở công viên.
translations.ar: نمارس التمارين في الهواء الطلق في الحديقة.
translations.nl: We sporten buiten in het park.
translations.uk: Ми тренуємось на свіжому повітрі в парку.
translations.hi: हम पार्क में कसरत करते हैं।
translations.pl: Ćwiczymy na świeżym powietrzu v parku.
translations.id: Kami berolahraga di luar, di taman.
translations.ro: Facem exerciții în aer liber în parc.

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition ('in' + 'dem'); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Noun; object of 'Im' in dative singular; location.
Finite verb (present, 1st person plural); verb-second after the fronted PP; takes object 'Gymnastik'.
Personal pronoun, nominative 1st plural; subject of 'machen'.
Adverb of place; modifies 'machen' to indicate the activity occurs outdoors.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'machen'.
